data.body:
## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh

- [ ] review-gate-allowlist.conf does not contain the v2 flat-file glob pattern
  Verify: ! grep -q '^\.tickets/\*\*' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/hooks/lib/review-gate-allowlist.conf

- [ ] review-gate-allowlist.conf still contains the v3 event-sourced path entry
  Verify: grep -q 'tickets-tracker' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/hooks/lib/review-gate-allowlist.conf

- [ ] The two-path comment explaining v2 and v3 is removed; comment updated for v3 only
  Verify: ! grep -q 'old flat-file' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/hooks/lib/review-gate-allowlist.conf

- [ ] ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
